name: Lily  Hoshina
description: Lily Hoshina is one of the main characters in B: The Beginning. She comes from a family of violin repairers and is a detective that works for the Royal Investigative Services.

name: Magilou
description: __Height:__ 160 cm A mysterious woman who introduces herself as a witch, Magilou is an extroverted and chatty woman on the outside, but there is something secretive and sinister about her.

name: Mao Motomiya
description: Childhood friends with the Nakamuras' and has a lonely childhood that consisted of an empty house, an unloyal mother, and a emotionally scarred father. Her parents are divorced. She lives with Nakamura Hiro and Nakamura Daiki because of an unloving atmosphere with her father and his new wife and daughter. ~!Is in love with Hiro and he with her.!~

name: Meinya
description: **Race**: Meinastoirim Meinya is [Prushka](https://anilist.co/character/122466/Prushka)'s pet given to her as a present from her adoptive father, [Bondrewd](https://anilist.co/character/122463/Bondrewd), as her 10th birthday present. name: Minamo Kamishiro
description: Natsuki's childhood friend. An earnest, innocent girl who has only ever known a small rural town. She is deeply attached to the town where she was born and raised, and even after her family evacuates to the mainland, she remains behind to look after the orphaned children.

name: Mitsuyoshi Anzai
description: The coach of the Shohoku High basketball team, and one of the best ones in Japan. Even the coaches of other teams call him "Anzai-sensei" with respect. His calm and collected attitude contrasts with the temper he had in the past, when he was nicknameed "White-Haired Devil" as a demanding college coach. description: She works as an inquisitor in the City of Ted.

name: Rein
description: He is a Beast Tamer who originally had no other combat skills except weak fire and healing spells, which leads him to be expelled from the hero's party. However, upon meeting Kanade and making a contract with her, Rein learns that he can also obtain other skills from members of strongest races, which makes him stronger with each new contract.

name: Ringo-chan
description: The Student Council President of Sanada East High. She is full of pride and has a short temper. But she is a bit of an airhead, which leads her to getting tricked very easily, like mistaking Karasawa's snoring for a cat's meow and standing on a step ladder in the Sanada North High Student Council Room to connect an internet cable to a intentionally misplaced router just so the Council could look at her panties from underneath. name: Rino Tanaka
description: [Tanaka](https://anilist.co/character/89787/Tanaka)'s little sister. She is a middle school student who is the manager of the Volleyball Club of her school. Rino is often told that she is similar to Tanaka as they both have a listless look in them. name: Shiki Ichinose
description: __Height:__ 161 cm __Hometown:__ Iwate Prefecture, Japan Shiki is a curious 18 y.o. girl who can be described only as "a mad scientist". She loves experiments, and is motivated by finding new things to hold her attention; if it's not interesting, she's not interested. Rather than being scouted by Producer, she chose him as part of one of her experiments. She sniffed the Producer and his smell convinced her that he was the right one for the experiment. name: Syaoran Li
description: Mysterious person kept asleep in a liquid chamber at Fei Wong Reed's palace, with his left eye covered by a piece of cloth, his hands and arms by binding spells and wearing clothes marking Fei Wong Reed's bat symbol. ~!In fact, this Syaoran is the original while the Syaoran at Sakura's side is only a clone that Fei Wong Reed created.!~

name: Takatoshi Tsuda
description: The main character of the story, he chooses to attend a former all-girl school simply because it is close to his home. The first day at the school, he is forced to join the student council as its vice president and sole male representative. Tsuda plays the role of the straight man, and is often worn out by his friends' antics.

name: Testarossa
description: Testarossa, the White Primordial, was an Arch Demon that was recruited by Diablo along with Carerra and Ultima to serve Rimuru. After being named, she evolved into a Demon Peer. She now serves as Tempest's Military Attaché, a representative for the Western States Council. ~!Following the battle with the Empire she awakened as a True Demon Lord.!~

name: Tieria Erde
description: __Unit__: GN-004 Gundam Nadleeh Tieria seems rather stoic and distant, although also proud and arrogant. Constantly believing he has the best interests of Celestial Being in mind, he rarely acts out of impulse, and has little patience for the impertinent. To this end, he often clashes verbally with the other Gundam Meisters, as well as their "superior", Sumeragi Lee Noriega, on topics ranging from insubordination to ideology. name: Yuzuko Nonohara
description: Yuzuko Nonohara is a member of the Data Processing Club. She seems to have an innocent personality, but she will sometimes break out in random bouts of outrageous behaviour.

name: Zaha Sanko
description: A 14-year-old hunted by the entire universe for possessing the bones that grant any wish.

name: Akane Kowata
description: Makoto's older sister and a full fledged witch. She contrasts Makoto in both personality and appearance. While Makoto is polite and soft spoken, Akane is more brash and loud mouthed, but still just as kind. She also has tanned skin and white hair, which contrasts with Makoto's pale skin and black hair.

name: Akira Shinonome
description: She enjoys reading difficult books, which gives her with lots of miscellaneous and detailed knowledge. She tries to act like an adult but can be childish and cowardly.
